nasb.text: “Is not the Lord your God with you? And has He not given you rest on every side? For He has given the inhabitants of the land into my hand, and the land is subdued before the Lord and before His people.

esv.text: “Is not the Lord your God with you? And has he not given you peace on every side? For he has delivered the inhabitants of the land into my hand, and the land is subdued before the Lord and his people.

cnv.text: 現在你們要立定心意，尋求耶和華你們的　神；你們當起來，建造耶和華　神的聖所，好把耶和華的約櫃和　神的神聖器皿，都搬進為耶和華的名所建造的殿宇中。”

ccb.text: 他说：“你们的上帝耶和华与你们同在，使你们四境平安。祂将这地方的居民交在我手中，使这地方被祂和祂的子民治理。
